{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Aetheric attacks
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Aetheric attacks]] result in a backlash.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c43">''The Knight'', chapter 43</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
